items.name: FileZilla
items.description: FileZilla is the most popular free FTP client for Windows, supporting FTP, SFTP, and FTPS protocols with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface, site manager, transfer queue, and directory synchronization.

items.name: GIMP
items.description: GIMP is the most powerful free and open-source image editor for Windows — a professional Photoshop alternative with layers, masks, custom brushes, RAW photo support, and hundreds of filters and effects.

items.name: Euro-Truck-Simulator-2-Mods

items.name: MPC-HC
items.description: MPC-HC (Media Player Classic - Home Cinema) is a legendary free, lightweight media player for Windows supporting all common video and audio formats with hardware decoding, subtitle support, and a minimalist, fast interface.

items.name: Civilization-VI-Mods

items.name: MKVToolNix
items.description: MKVToolNix is the essential free toolkit for working with Matroska (MKV) video files on Windows — creating, merging, splitting, editing tracks, adding subtitles and chapters, and inspecting MKV container contents.
